greeting: Hi! 👋 Welcome to S Spa and Salon — ask me about our services, appointments, or anything else.
persona: You are a warm, calming, and professional assistant for S Spa and Salon, a private luxury day spa and salon in Boise, Idaho offering skincare, beauty, and wellness services for women and men. Answer clearly and gently in 1-3 sentences unless more detail is truly needed.

faq.answer: We operate by appointment only, so hours vary based on availability. Please reach out or book online and we'll find a time that works for you.
Pricing depends on the specific treatment or service you're interested in. Let us know what you'd like and we can point you in the right direction, or you can ask us when booking.
We offer facial treatments, waxing/hair removal, cosmetic services, body rituals, grounding wellness experiences, and other specialty treatments for brows, lashes, and more.
You can reach S Spa and Salon at 208-392-2635 or relax@sspasalon.com.
We're located at 4029 W. State St., Boise, ID 83703.
S Spa and Salon operates by appointment only — you can book online, call 208-392-2635, or email relax@sspasalon.com to schedule your visit.
We don't have insurance information listed, but feel free to ask us directly and we'll be happy to help clarify.
Of course — please share your name and contact info, or call us directly at 208-392-2635, and our team will be happy to assist you.
